name:
Tests that snapshot refs are deterministic and stable across page states.

   Content-hash refs use FNV-1a(role|name|tag) so the same element always
   gets the same ref regardless of what other elements exist on the page. > refs survive DOM mutations > removing an element does not change remaining refs
fullName:

   Content-hash refs use FNV-1a(role|name|tag) so the same element always
   gets the same ref regardless of what other elements exist on the page..refs survive DOM mutations.removing an element does not change remaining refs

labels.value: removing an element does not change remaining refs
